hero.name: Yassine Hallous
hero.tagline: Computer Engineer passionate about cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, and IoT. Turning real-world challenges into secure and intelligent solutions.

about.subtitle: Computer Engineering graduate experienced in building secure and intelligent solutions, from scalable software systems to connected IoT platforms. Proven leadership and project coordination through organizing technical initiatives, leading engineering activities, and contributing to the IEEE community.

fieldsOfInterest.title: App Development
fieldsOfInterest.description: I enjoy turning ideas into functional mobile or web applications and creating interfaces that feel simple and intuitive for users.

fieldsOfInterest.title: AI & Machine Learning
fieldsOfInterest.description: I'm motivated by building models that learn from data and help automate decisions, especially when they solve real problems.

fieldsOfInterest.title: Embedded Systems & IoT
fieldsOfInterest.description: I love connecting hardware and software together, working with sensors, and building systems that react in real time.

fieldsOfInterest.title: Cybersecurity
fieldsOfInterest.description: I enjoy exploring offensive and defensive security, participating in CTFs, and building solutions that help secure modern applications and IoT systems.

fieldsOfInterest.title: Cloud & DevOps
fieldsOfInterest.description: I'm interested in containerization, cloud infrastructure, and deployment automation to build scalable and reliable systems.

projects.subtitle: A showcase of my technical projects spanning AI, cybersecurity, backend development, and IoT solutions.

certifications.subtitle: Professional certifications and credentials demonstrating expertise across multiple domains.
